summary: Video. A silent slideshow of static text cards over a single black-and-white handcuffs B-roll image, rotating through arrested individuals' names, cities, and crimes under the 'The Worst First: Weekly Wrap Up' branding. There is no audio, no music, and no transcript; each card lists a name and charges (child molestation, robbery, homicide, and others). It is a recap graphic.
notable_text: Anh Nguyen - Child molestation, DUI, Failure to register as sex offender (Detroit, MI)
Jose Miguel Perez-Perez - Child sexual assault (Chicago, IL)
Mongong Kual Maniang Deng - Homicide (St. Paul, MN)
